title: F1 selector fix — code change + unit test

code_changes: src/training/runners/mtl_cv.py:131 — new _compute_joint_geom_simple helper (sqrt(reg_top10_indist * cat_f1) with fallback to top10_acc and then to fallback_f1)
src/training/runners/mtl_cv.py:212 — train_model new kwarg mtl_joint_selector: str = 'b9'
src/training/runners/mtl_cv.py:679-686 — compute joint_canonical_b9 + joint_geom_simple alongside legacy joint_score
src/training/runners/mtl_cv.py:786-793 — log all three selectors in metrics dict (val_joint_canonical_b9, val_joint_geom_simple, val_joint_geom_lift)
src/training/runners/mtl_cv.py:1158-1160 — pass config.mtl_joint_selector via getattr (back-compat for old configs)
src/configs/experiment.py:128 — mtl_joint_selector field added with default 'b9'
scripts/train.py:466-483 — --mtl-joint-selector CLI flag added with help text + choices

unit_tests.test_joint_geom_simple_computes_sqrt_pro: PASS — F1 fix formula = sqrt(top10 * cat_f1)
unit_tests.test_joint_geom_simple_falls_back_when_t: PASS — legacy 7-class slot B uses sqrt(f1 * f1) fallback
unit_tests.test_joint_geom_simple_zero_safe: PASS — head collapse clamped at 1e-8 floor (no NaN/Inf)
unit_tests.test_selector_dispatch_b9_unchanged: PASS — default 'b9' returns legacy mean-of-F1s bit-equivalent
unit_tests.test_selector_rejects_unknown_name: PASS — typos raise ValueError; no silent fallback
unit_tests.test_c21_fingerprint_selectors_diverge: PASS — on synthetic C21 trajectory (cat monotone, top10 peak-and-collapse, reg_f1 flat), b9 picks ep 29 (late) with top10=0.65, geom_simple picks ep 7 with top10=0.73; Δtop10 = +0.08 captured by the F1 fix
unit_tests.test_train_model_signature_has_mtl_joint: PASS — plumbing verified, default 'b9' confirms back-compat

verdict: F1 selector fix lands as a back-compat-safe runtime feature. Default behaviour bit-equivalent to pre-2026-05-20 production. New runs can opt into substrate-aware checkpoint selection via --mtl-joint-selector geom_simple.
